scheduler.responsibility: Wake every 10 minutes, alternate dispatches, update loop state, and stop when tasks are complete or blocked.

implementation.responsibility: Implement exactly one smallest unblocked AgentHUD task slice per optimize dispatch.

checker.responsibility: Inspect recent work, write guidance, and adjust planning/task metadata only.

stop_policy.condition: All tasks in tasks.json are completed or blocked with documented recovery action.
stop_policy.action: Scheduler writes .codex-loop/state/stop.flag after the final dispatch or before dispatch if already done.
